titleEn: Muyuan Foods prices Hong Kong IPO at top of range
titleZh: 牧原食品港股IPO定价上限，募资107亿港元
summaryZh: 中国最大生猪养殖企业牧原食品将其香港IPO定价在发行价上限，每股39港元，拟募资约107亿港元（13.7亿美元）。此次发行2.74亿股H股，将成为香港今年迄今最大规模IPO之一。募资将用于育种、智慧养殖、营养管理和生物安全等领域的研发。在中国猪肉供应过剩、需求疲软、经济放缓导致猪价下跌、养殖利润受压的背景下，牧原逆势上市。
featuredReason: 牧原作为中国最大猪企，其IPO募资明确投向智慧养殖（智能养殖、营养管理、生物安全）研发，对智慧畜牧行业具有风向标意义，值得关注其后续技术投入与行业影响。
contentFull: Company News Muyuan Foods prices Hong Kong IPO at top of range China’s largest pig breeder targets HK$10.7 bln raise 5 February 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Asia China's biggest pig breeder, Muyuan Foods said on Wednesday it has determined to price its Hong Kong listing at its maximum offer price, aiming to raise about HK$10.69 billion ($1.37 billion) from the share sale, reported Reuters. The firm has offered 274 million H shares for the listing, with the offer price at HK$39 apiece, which sets the share sale to be one of Hong Kong's biggest so far this year.Muyuan Foods expects to announce the allocation results on February 5. The shares will make their debut on the Hong Kong bourse on February 6, according to a regulatory filing.The offering comes as China grapples with a pork glut amid weak demand and a slowing economy, which has pushed prices lower and squeezed farmers' margins.Proceeds from the share sale will be used to fund research and development in areas such as breeding, smart farming, nutrition management and biosecurity.($1 = 7.8109 Hong Kong dollars) Our Partners PIC dsm-firmenich Lanxess Hamlet Protein Global Ag Media More from this author More News View all US pork exports to Taiwan up 53% through April - USMEF Markets Imports and Exports Trade 26 June 2026 1 minute read Hog herd steady year-on-year as pork prices tick higher - CME Market Trends Markets and economics 26 June 2026 1 minute read Cattle futures rise on tight supply Belgian heatwave hits milk and meat output as livestock suffer Pig Welfare Extreme Weather Events 26 June 2026 1 minute read Farmer says heat costs him up to €200 a day in lost production Our Partners PIC dsm-firmenich Lanxess Hamlet Protein
translationZh:
中国最大的生猪养殖企业牧原食品周三宣布，已将其香港上市发行价定在最高发行价，旨在通过此次股票发行筹集约106.9亿港元（13.7亿美元），据路透社报道。该公司为上市发行了2.74亿股H股，发行价为每股39港元，这使得此次股票发行成为香港今年迄今规模最大的发行之一。

牧原食品预计将于2月5日公布配售结果。根据监管文件，这些股票将于2月6日在香港交易所首次亮相。

此次发行正值中国面临猪肉供应过剩、需求疲软和经济放缓之际，这压低了猪价并挤压了养殖户的利润空间。

此次股票发行的收益将用于育种、智慧养殖、营养管理和生物安全等领域的研发。

（1美元=7.8109港元）
contentHtml:
Muyuan Foods prices Hong Kong IPO at top of range 
China’s largest pig breeder targets HK$10.7 bln raise
